title: Oficina de Inmigraciones
setting: A government office in Buenos Aires. 2:30 PM. You need to resolve a paperwork issue and negotiate with a helpful but firm clerk.

npc.name: Licenciada Rojas
npc.personality: formal, precise, by-the-book government clerk. Helpful but expects proper procedure. Uses formal 'usted'.
npc.initialLine: Buenas tardes. Le toca el turno 42. ¿Me dice en qué puedo ayudarla?
npc.initialTranslation: Good afternoon. Your number is 42. Please tell me how I can help you.

debriefRu: Eres un extranjero viviendo en Buenos Aires. Necesitas renovar tu permiso de residencia. Debes hablar formalmente con la funcionaria y negociar una solución.
debriefEn: You are a foreigner living in Buenos Aires. You need to renew your residence permit. You must speak formally with the clerk and negotiate a solution.

turns.instruction: Respond to the clerk's greeting. Explain politely that you need to renew your residence permit and are unsure about the procedure.

prompt.ru: Buenas tardes, licenciada. Vengo a renovar mi permiso de residencia, pero no estoy seguro del trámite.
prompt.phonetic: BWEH-nas TAR-des, lee-sen-sya-DA. VEN-go a re-no-VAR mee per-MEE-so de re-see-DEN-sya, PE-ro no es-TOY se-GOO-ro del TRA-mee-teh.
prompt.en: Good afternoon, ma'am. I've come to renew my residence permit, but I'm not sure about the procedure.

npcReply.ru: Muy bien. Necesito ver el permiso anterior y una copia de su pasaporte, por favor.
npcReply.en: Very well. I need to see your previous permit and a copy of your passport, please.

turns.instruction: She asks for your old permit. Apologize — you only brought a photocopy — and ask what other documents are needed.

prompt.ru: Discúlpeme, solo traje una fotocopia del permiso. ¿Qué otros documentos necesito presentar?
prompt.phonetic: Dees-KOOL-peh-meh, SO-lo tra-HEH OO-na fo-to-ko-PEE-a del per-MEE-so. Ke O-tros do-koo-MEN-tos ne-se-SEE-to pre-sen-TAR?
prompt.en: Excuse me, I only brought a photocopy of the permit. What other documents do I need to submit?

npcReply.ru: Necesitamos el original, comprobante de domicilio actualizado y la foto carnet.
npcReply.en: We need the original, a current proof of address, and an ID photo.

turns.instruction: She lists several documents you don't have. Ask respectfully if there is any other way to move the renewal forward today.

prompt.ru: Entiendo. ¿Hay alguna forma de avanzar con la renovación hoy mismo?
prompt.phonetic: En-TYEN-do. I al-GOO-na FOR-ma de a-van-SAR kon la re-no-va-SYON oy MEEZ-mo?
prompt.en: I understand. Is there any way to move the renewal forward today?

npcReply.ru: Bueno, podemos hacer una prórroga temporal mientras usted junta el resto de la documentación.
npcReply.en: Well, we can do a temporary extension while you gather the rest of the documentation.

turns.instruction: She says maybe a temporary extension is possible. Ask her to process one while you gather the missing papers.

prompt.ru: ¿Podría gestionarme una prórroga temporal mientras junto los papeles que faltan?
prompt.phonetic: Po-DREE-a hes-tee-o-NAR-meh OO-na PRO-ro-ga tem-po-RAL myen-tras HOON-to los pa-PE-les ke FAL-tan?
prompt.en: Could you process a temporary extension for me while I gather the missing papers?

npcReply.ru: Sí, señor. Le preparo la prórroga. Tiene que volver dentro de diez días hábiles con el original.
npcReply.en: Yes, sir. I'll prepare the extension. You must return within ten business days with the original.

turns.instruction: She agrees and gives you an appointment. Thank her for her patience and ask when exactly you should return.

prompt.ru: Muchas gracias por su paciencia. ¿A qué hora y en qué día debo regresar?
prompt.phonetic: MOO-chas GRA-syas por soo pa-syEN-sya. A ke O-ra ee en ke DEE-a DE-bo re-gre-SAR?
prompt.en: Thank you very much for your patience. At what time and on what day should I return?

npcReply.ru: Pase el lunes 14 a las nueve de la mañana, por favor. Que tenga buen día.
npcReply.en: Come in Monday the 14th at nine in the morning, please. Have a good day.
